questions.question: Games ___ played by me yesterday. (過去形の受動態)
questions.explanation: 過去形の受動態は were/was + 過去分詞です

questions.question: Games ___ played by me tomorrow. (未来形の受動態)
questions.explanation: 未来形の受動態は will be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: Games ___ played by me. (現在完了の受動態)
questions.explanation: 現在完了の受動態は have/has been + 過去分詞です

questions.question: A letter ___ written by me. (過去形の受動態)
questions.explanation: 過去形の受動態は was/were + 過去分詞です

questions.question: A cake ___ made by me tomorrow. (未来形の受動態)
questions.explanation: 未来形の受動態は will be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The book ___ read by me. (現在完了の受動態)
questions.explanation: 現在完了の受動態は has/have been + 過去分詞です

questions.question: English ___ spoken in many countries. (現在形の受動態)
questions.explanation: 現在形の受動態は is/are + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The window ___ broken yesterday. (過去形の受動態)
questions.explanation: 過去形の受動態は was/were + 過去分詞です
